title: To His Girls
content:
Wanton wenches do not bring
For my hairs black colouring:
For my locks, girls, let 'em be
Grey or white, all's one to me.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "To His Girls"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
